title: fisk-ai session store v1 assistant record

message.description: The assistant turn in the provider-neutral llm.Message model (role and a content block list). Opaque here so provider-specific blocks, including thinking signatures and server-side tool blocks carried as neutral provider blocks, are preserved without this schema constraining them.

cache_read_tokens.description: Input tokens served from the prompt cache. Additive and optional; absent on a journal written before prompt caching, where it folds as zero.

cache_create_tokens.description: Input tokens written into the prompt cache. Additive and optional; absent on a journal written before prompt caching, where it folds as zero.
